title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 26 2022
summary:
Main
Bulkers: Supramax Bulker values have firmed
Panamax Coral Topaz (76,600 DWT, Jul 2007, Sasebo) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 18.50 mil, VV Value USD 18.55 mil. Panamax Santa Cruz (76,400 DWT, Aug 2005, Tsuneishi Zosen) sold to Eurodry for USD 15.75 mil, VV Value USD 16.38 mil - Inc Charter. Panamax Shao Shan 1 (74,000 DWT, Jun 1997, Tadotsu Tsuneishi) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 8.60 mil, VV Value USD 8.91 mil - At Auction.
